units.content: multiple LLM extractors processing same corpus produce different tokenizer surface forms for same concept
tokenizer variants register as distinct entities without canonicalization
distinct entity registration causes artificial Fission counts that accumulate with corpus size
three gates for fusion check: string proximity, coupling-value identity, source-context
all three gates must pass for fusion
normalized Levenshtein distance < tau is gate 1 criterion
shares at least one coupling with same property+value is gate 2 criterion
same source paper OR related citation OR research group is gate 3 criterion
canonicalize_signifier function determines whether candidate is label variant or new entity
string_distance measures similarity between normalized labels
normalization catches parenthetical variants like tucatinib vs tucatinib (irbinitinib)
shared_count tracks number of matching property+value pairs between candidate and existing couplings
match_type identifies source relationship: same-paper, citation, author-group, or None
missing metadata does not block fusion on gate 3
